title: Milium spica-venti
taxonomy: Milium spica-venti is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. Within this family, it is categorized under the subfamily Pooideae. This subfamily is further divided into the tribe Poeae, where Milium spica-venti is placed. The tribe Poeae is comprised of various grass species, including those in the genus Milium. Milium spica-venti's classification is also reflected in its botanical name, which indicates its unique characteristics and relationship to other grasses.
